project_area: Increase food access for New Yorkers in underserved regions by supporting development/expansion of supermarkets, food cooperatives, farm stands, retail food stores, mobile markets, and equipment purchases to improve food offerings.
demographic_requirements: Targeted to New Yorkers living in areas without grocery stores and options for healthy, affordable food.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include nonprofits, public benefit corporations, local/regional development corporations, tribal governments, and local/municipal agencies. Partnerships with for-profit retailers are permitted. Projects must focus on increasing food availability through infrastructure development, equipment purchases, or mobile markets.
